sections.title: Acknowledgement
sections.html: I acknowledge that I have received, read, and understand the safety policies of MH Construction, Inc. as described in the Employee Handbook and the MISH (Accident Prevention Program). I understand that safety is a shared responsibility and a condition of my employment. I agree to follow all applicable OSHA standards, site-specific safety requirements, and the daily Job Hazard Analysis (Tailgate) for my scope of work, to wear all required personal protective equipment, and to report any injury, near-miss, or unsafe condition to my supervisor immediately. I understand that I have both the authority and the obligation to stop work when a condition is unsafe.
